name: Calculatrice de Peinture
seo_title: Calculatrice Peinture – Litres et Pots Nécessaires
seo_description: Calculez le nombre de litres et pots de peinture nécessaires. Entrez les dimensions, le nombre de couches et le type de peinture pour obtenir la quantité exacte.
description: Calculateur 1111. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
desc: Calculateur 1111. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
steps: Total wall area: 4 × 14 m × 2.5 m = 140 m² (for a square room — adjust for actual perimeter)
Subtract doors/windows: 3 × 2 m² = 6 m² → 134 m² paintable
mistakes: Using the floor area instead of the wall area
Forgetting that dark colours or stained walls need 3 coats instead of 2
Not accounting for texture — rough or porous walls absorb 20-30% more paint
formula_display: Paintable area = (perimeter × height) - doors_windows; Litres = area × coats ÷ coverage_per_litre
